title: prunus mollis
intro: Prunus mollis, also known as the Chinese plum or soft-leaved plum, is a deciduous shrub native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus mollis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Prunus mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and other medicinal preparations.
